title: Kenya Luxury Girls’ Getaway Experience
content: A well curated Fashion and design tour that will Reconnect you with your friends, make you Reminisce, as well as catch up and create a unique adventure experience and spend quality memorable time with your girls in stunning locations for an unforgettable getaway experience.
excerpt: A well curated Fashion and design tour that will Reconnect you with your friends, make you Reminisce, as well as catch up and create a unique adventure experience and spend quality memorable time with your girls in stunning locations for an unforgettable getaway experience.

title: Made in Africa Shopping Experience
content: At Tribe Hotel, Africa’s spirit comes alive through design, hospitality, and a curated shopping experience. Connected to the vibrant Village Market, guests can explore boutiques and concept stores that celebrate African creativity, craftsmanship, and contemporary style. From handwoven textiles and artisanal décor to bespoke jewelry and fashion by leading regional designers, every item tells a story rooted in tradition yet reimagined for today. This retail journey goes beyond shopping, offering an immersive experience of Africa’s cultural richness. Guests can discover bold prints, intricate beadwork, and modern lifestyle brands while taking home unique pieces that reflect the continent’s innovation and heritage. Just steps from the lobby, Tribe Hotel provides effortless access to Africa’s creative heartbeat.
excerpt: This retail journey goes beyond shopping, offering an immersive experience of Africa’s cultural richness. Guests can discover bold prints, intricate beadwork, and modern lifestyle brands while taking home unique pieces that reflect the continent’s innovation and heritage.

title: Cinema in Nature – By Sounds of Freedom
content: Cinema in Nature turns Nairobi’s Karura Forest into a unique cultural adventure. Guests embark on a guided forest walk with wireless headphones, listening to an immersive audio film that brings Kenya’s young independence heroes to life. Along the trails, including the Mau Mau Caves and waterfalls, history merges with nature, creating a vivid connection between land, memory, and freedom. The journey concludes with a forest picnic and a creative painting session, allowing participants to express their own interpretations of freedom, art, and nature. More than a walk, Cinema in Nature blends storytelling, history, and creativity in a memorable, inspiring, and accessible experience.
excerpt: This is more than a walk; it’s a holistic experience that blends history, storytelling, and creativity in one of Nairobi’s most beautiful natural spaces. Easy to join, fun to share, and unforgettable to remember, Cinema in Nature is the perfect activity for adventurers seeking culture, connection, and inspiration.

title: Organic Dining Experience
content: The Organic Dining Experience invites guests to slow down and reconnect with nature through mindful, fresh, and sustainable cuisine. Set in a warm, natural atmosphere, each ingredient is carefully sourced from organic farms and ethical producers, ensuring freshness, flavor, and respect for the land. Dishes highlight the natural colors, textures, and aromas of seasonal produce, allowing flavors to shine without unnecessary enhancement. Beyond nourishment for the body, the experience encourages presence and reflection, celebrating sustainability, mindful living, and the pure joy of eating in harmony with nature.
excerpt: Discover a unique farm-to-table journey in the heart of the Maasai Mara. Pick fresh ingredients from our organic garden, curate your menu with our chef, and enjoy an interactive cook-out in the wild—celebrating nature, wellness, and sustainability

title: Safari Park Flaming Night Experience
content: Welcome to Safari Park Flaming Nights – an evening that brings together the best of Kenya’s culture, food and entertainment.Your night begins with the taste of Kenya’s most loved dish, Nyama Choma, slow roasted to perfection and served with your favorite drink. As you relax and enjoy every bite, the atmosphere comes alive with the sound of an African themed live band, filling the air with music that stirs the heart and spirit.The highlight of the evening is the world-famous Safari Cats Dancers & Acrobats. For an unforgettable forty five minutes, they light up the stage with dazzling acrobatics and captivating dance; a mix of energy, rhythm and artistry.All this unfolds at Safari Park Hotel’s African restaurant – Nyama Choma Ranch, an oasis of tranquility in the heart of Nairobi. A perfect setting for laughter, music and unforgettable memories. Whether you are visiting for the first time, a resident looking for a special night out, or a guest at the hotel, Safari Park Flaming Nights offers a one of a kind memorable experience.
excerpt: Welcome to Safari Park Flaming Nights – an evening that brings together the best of Kenya’s culture, food and entertainment.Your night begins with the taste of Kenya’s most loved dish, Nyama Choma, slow roasted to perfection and served with your favorite drink.

title: Run Wild, Kenya Safari Experience
content: This running experience takes you across Kenya’s most breathtaking landscapes, blending adventure, culture, and purpose. From the peaceful trails of Karura Forest to the dramatic scenery of Hell’s Gate and the high-altitude training grounds of Iten, runners are immersed in nature and guided by a strong sense of community. Along the way, participants can also support local initiatives, making each step meaningful.The journey continues through the wildlife-rich Lake Nakuru and culminates in the iconic Maasai Mara, where stunning landscapes and encounters with wildlife create unforgettable moments. Combined with rich Maasai cultural experiences, this is more than a run—it’s a transformative journey of exploration, connection, and inspiration.
excerpt: This running experience takes you across Kenya’s most breathtaking landscapes, blending adventure, culture, and purpose. From the peaceful trails of Karura Forest to the dramatic scenery of Hell’s Gate and the high-altitude training grounds of Iten, runners are immersed in nature and guided by a strong sense of community. Along the way, participants can also support local initiatives, making each step meaningful.

title: Immersive Conservation Experience
content: A reflection of Kanya`s commitment in sustainable travel is development of a different and innovative safari experience as you are coopted to the day to day running of a 90,000 acre of a leading nonprofit wildlife conservancy focused on conservation of endangered species.Be part of an immersive behind the scenes experience that offers a blend of hands-on conservation and wildlife engagement ushering you into a world where conservation becomes personal and embrace our role as custodians of our ecosystem.This engaging and holistic program is designed for participants to engage directly with endangered species going beyond wildlife viewing but creating a profound emotional bond.
excerpt: A reflection of Kanya`s commitment in sustainable travel is development of a different and innovative safari experience as you are coopted to the day to day running of a 90,000 acre of a leading nonprofit wildlife conservancy focused on conservation of endangered species.

title: Kicheche Walking Safari Experience
content: Experience an authentic, immersive and unforgettable Walking adventure across two stunning conservancies in the world renowned Masai Mara National Reserve.The uniqueness of the new safari experience is the walking safari that reveals usually overlooked wonders of the savannah.
excerpt: Experience the Masai Mara on foot through an immersive walking safari that reveals the hidden details of the wilderness. Guided by expert naturalists, this slow, interpretive journey uncovers tracks, birds, plants, and rarely seen behaviours, creating a deeper connection with the land and its wildlife. A truly intimate encounter with nature.

title: Karura Forest Nature Trails Experience
content: Karura Forest offers a unique escape where serenity, wellness, and nature exist within the city. Its well-marked trails wind through towering indigenous trees, inviting visitors to walk, jog, or cycle while enjoying birdsong and fresh air. Along the way, you encounter natural highlights such as waterfalls, caves, bamboo groves, and rich biodiversity that showcase Nairobi’s natural heritage.The experience is deeply restorative, providing space for solitude, connection, and renewal. Whether visiting alone or with others, Karura Forest allows you to relax, recharge, and reconnect with nature—making it more than just a destination, but a refreshing journey into tranquility and balance.
excerpt: Karura Forest uniqueness is its ability to immerse you in an atmosphere of serenity, wellness, and discovery without leaving the city behind. Its winding, well-marked trails invite you to walk, jog, or cycle under the cool shade of towering indigenous trees, where the air is filled with birdsong and the soft rustle of leaves. Along the way, you encounter stunning natural features: tranquil waterfalls, mysterious caves, bamboo groves, and rich biodiversity that capture the essence of Nairobi’s natural heritage.

title: Governors Balloon Safaris
content: Drift gently with the dawn breeze over the river and plains of the Masai Mara National Reserve with Governors Balloon Safaris along what is widely accepted as one of the best balloon flight paths anywhere.  Lift off at the start of the early morning golden hour from a protected clearing in the forest and enjoy a birds-eye view of this famous ecosystem – one of the wonders of the wildlife world.  Afterwards, toast your experience with a glass of bubbly at your bush breakfast site out on the plains where everything is cooked fresh for you on a set of balloon burners.  World class pilots look after you every minute of the way – they have been flying safely here for almost half a century.  Truly the experience of a lifetime.
excerpt: With probably the best flight path in the Mara and safe operations for almost 50 years, flying with Governors Balloon Safaris during the dawn golden hour over the Masai Mara is truly a bucket list experience. Finish your morning off with a fabulous bush breakfast out on the plains.
